title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.565 - Violation of section or regulation, misdemeanor
text:
249.565.  Violation of section or regulation, misdemeanor. — Any person who shall violate section 249.560, or any order, rule or regulation adopted under the authority of said section shall be guilty of a misdemeanor.
(L. 1955 p. 606 § 1)
